differential_diagnoses: Postpartum major depressive disorder with anxious distress
Adjustment disorder with mixed anxiety and depressed mood
next_steps: Comprehensive risk assessment for harm to self or others
Initiation of cognitive behavioral therapy with exposure and response prevention (ERP)
Optimization of SSRI pharmacotherapy (e.g., increasing dose or switching to a more potent serotonergic agent)
Evaluation for augmentation of antidepressant therapy with a low-dose atypical antipsychotic
Close monitoring for safety, including supervised interactions with the infant
Psychoeducation for the patient and family regarding the nature of intrusive thoughts to reduce stigma and distress
Continued monitoring of blood pressure and postpartum medical stability

differential_diagnoses: Postpartum major depressive disorder with anxious distress
Postpartum hypertension with associated neurological or psychological symptoms
Adjustment disorder with mixed anxiety and depressed mood
next_steps: Comprehensive assessment for suicidality and safety planning, including supervised infant care
Laboratory workup including TSH, Free T4, and repeat renal/liver function tests
Optimization of antidepressant therapy (e.g., SSRI dose escalation or switch)
Referral to specialized postpartum or reproductive psychiatry care
Initiation of cognitive behavioral therapy with exposure and response prevention (ERP)
Continued monitoring of blood pressure and postpartum medical status
Psychoeducation for patient and family regarding the ego-dystonic nature of intrusive thoughts
Lactation consultation to address mastitis or physical discomfort if breast-feeding is still desired
